---
title: Intérieur de café en hiver
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549191/cafehiver_xnvjyo.jpg
description: Intérieur de café en hiver
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/11/28
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549191/cafehiver_xnvjyo.jpg)
